prestazioni: Engine swap to a **G13B** (1.3L DOHC 16V from the Suzuki Cultus GTi/Swift GTi) with a **Garrett GT2554R turbocharger**, custom **Tomei 264° camshafts**, and a **HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve** for the stock M/T transmission. The G13B will be stroked to 1.5L using a **JE 83mm forged piston kit** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, paired with a **Toda Racing 8.5:1 compression ratio head gasket** and **ARP head studs** for boost resilience up to 18 psi.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Sparco Speed** with a **4-2-1 header** (equal-length primaries) and a **MagnaFlow 14816 muffler** for optimal scavenging. The intake system will feature a **K&N 69-1501TTK** cold air intake with a **custom aluminum velocity stack** and **Silicone Hoses Direct 3.5-inch MAF housing** to accommodate the turbocharger’s airflow demands.

Standalone **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** with **AEM 30-2056 wideband O2 sensor** and **ID1000x injectors** for precise fuel mapping. Suspension will be upgraded with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (custom valved for the Esteem’s **HLA34 chassis**), **Whiteline 22mm adjustable rear sway bar**, and **Cusco front strut tower bar** to eliminate chassis flex. Braking will be handled by **DBA 5000 Series rotors** with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Esteem-specific widebody kit** (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** to fit **Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +38 wheels** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 195/50R15 tires**. The kit will be painted in **PPG Suzuki Sport Blue Pearl (Code: 1G6)** with **matte black accents** on the roof and mirrors.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (custom vented for the G13B turbo setup) and **custom rear diffuser** by **VIS Racing** with **integrated dual 3-inch exhaust outlets**. The front bumper will be modified with a **custom aluminum mesh grille** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** in **OEM-style housings**.

**Interior stripped and reupholstered** with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats** (custom mounts for the Esteem’s floorpan), **Takata 4-point harnesses**, and a **Sparco Pro2000 steering wheel** on a **NRG quick-release hub**. The dashboard will be replaced with a **Defi Advance BF gauge cluster** (boost, oil pressure, and wideband) and a **custom aluminum shift knob** (weighted for the M/T) with **Suzuki GTi embroidered shift boot**.
